payload.answer: The new statement supersedes the prior open/planned status for the Brain Slack agent MVP: the MVP is now implemented. Do not treat the earlier planned/open state as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The new item appears to refer to an MVP milestone of the existing Brain Slack agent project, not necessarily the entire agent. Link rather than fully merge to avoid overstating implementation of the full agent.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

details: Committed current status: Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.
Preserved ambiguity between the MVP milestone and the full Brain Slack agent.
Marked the prior planned/open status as superseded for the MVP context.
